posts.title: Why we insist on European ingredients
posts.summary: We choose raw materials with the same rigor we once applied to pharmaceuticals. Here's why MullaeCompany sources from Europe.
posts.content:
The supplement market is flooded with ingredients. Even the same compound can vary wildly in quality depending on origin, extraction method, and purity.

At MullaeCompany, we apply the same standards we used in pharma. For every single ingredient, we review clinical data, stability test results, and manufacturing certifications.

We chose European ingredients for a simple reason: Europe has the strictest raw material regulations in the world, and ingredients that pass those standards are ones we can stand behind.

Going forward, we'll use this blog to openly share the sourcing and verification data for every ingredient we use.
